case_title: MADARIS, DELICIA SHARCE MS. VS SULLIVAN, CARL J. MR. JR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY MADARIS, DELICIA SHARCE MS. AS TO DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, CARL J. MR. JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-18-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-15-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, CARL J. MR. JR.
CASE FILE SENT TO COMM. LYONS AT 850 ST. DEPT. B PER COMM LYONS REQUEST.
PLFT TO SEND A COMPLETE COPY OF LEASE 30-DAY NOTIC TO COMM LYONS AT 850 BRYANT DEPT B BY 6/15/98.DEFT TO SEND COMPLETE COPY OF PLFT'S BREAKING THE LEASE
LETTER TO COMM LYONS AT SAME ADDRESS BY 6/15/98. NO APPEARANCE NECESSARY ON 6/15/98 UNLESS ORDERED BY THE COURT.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT. SULLIVAN SENT TO COMM LYONS AT H OF J. RE: COPY OF LEASE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MADARIS, DELICIA SHARCE MS. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, CARL J. MR. JR. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,020.00, THE BARBEQUE SOUGHT BY PLAINTIFF TO BE RETURNED IS DEEMED ABANDONED. DEFENDANT HAS NO RESPONSIBILITY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, CARL J. MR. JR. HEARING SET FOR NOV-19-1998 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF NOV-19-1998, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, CARL J. MR. JR.
OEX OFF CALENDAR. NO PAPER WORK SUBMITTED IN COURT AS REQUIRED TO BE ON CALENDAR. PLTF APPEARED AND WAS HANDED GUIDELINE RE COMPLIANCE WITH LOCAL
ORIGINAL OEX FORM MAILED BY PLTF TO DEFT CARL SULLIVAN THROUGH CERTIFIED MAIL, RETURNED BY THE POST OFFICE TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE ON OEX FOR 11/19/98 HEARING, FILED.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLTF RE WAIVER OF THE 120 DAYS STAY ON ISSUANCE OF ANOTHER OEX, FILED. SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR AN ORDER.
ORDER LIFTING THE 4 MONTH STAY ON ISSUANCE OF ANOTHER OEX SIGNED AND FILED. COPY SENT TO PLAINTIFF.
